# SegmentedControl

A segmented control component (also known as a button group selector) for toggling between a set of options. Also available under the `SegmentGroup` alias.

## Import

```jsx
import { SegmentedControl } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
// or
import { SegmentGroup } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

All sub-components are accessible as properties of the main component using dot notation. Both `SegmentedControl` and `SegmentGroup` provide the same nested API:

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `SegmentedControl` / `SegmentGroup` | The root wrapper (renders `SegmentGroup.Root`). Manages selected value |
| `SegmentedControl.Item` / `SegmentGroup.Item` | An individual segment option |
| `SegmentedControl.Items` / `SegmentGroup.Items` | Container that wraps the items |
| `SegmentedControl.Indicator` / `SegmentGroup.Indicator` | The sliding indicator that highlights the active segment |
| `SegmentedControl.ItemHiddenInput` / `SegmentGroup.ItemHiddenInput` | Hidden radio input for form submission within each item |
| `SegmentedControl.ItemText` / `SegmentGroup.ItemText` | The text label content within a segment item |

## SegmentedControl (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | Controlled selected value |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | - | Initial selected value for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: string }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the selected value changes |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the segmented control |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the control is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<SegmentedControl defaultValue="daily">
  <SegmentedControl.Indicator />
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="daily">Daily</SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="weekly">Weekly</SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="monthly">Monthly</SegmentedControl.Item>
</SegmentedControl>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [view, setView] = useState("list");

<SegmentedControl value={view} onValueChange={(e) => setView(e.value)}>
  <SegmentedControl.Indicator />
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="list">List</SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="grid">Grid</SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="board">Board</SegmentedControl.Item>
</SegmentedControl>
```

### Using SegmentGroup alias

```jsx
<SegmentGroup defaultValue="tab1">
  <SegmentGroup.Indicator />
  <SegmentGroup.Item value="tab1">Tab 1</SegmentGroup.Item>
  <SegmentGroup.Item value="tab2">Tab 2</SegmentGroup.Item>
</SegmentGroup>
```

### With hidden inputs and item text

```jsx
<SegmentedControl defaultValue="daily">
  <SegmentedControl.Indicator />
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="daily">
    <SegmentedControl.ItemText>Daily</SegmentedControl.ItemText>
    <SegmentedControl.ItemHiddenInput />
  </SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="weekly">
    <SegmentedControl.ItemText>Weekly</SegmentedControl.ItemText>
    <SegmentedControl.ItemHiddenInput />
  </SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="monthly">
    <SegmentedControl.ItemText>Monthly</SegmentedControl.ItemText>
    <SegmentedControl.ItemHiddenInput />
  </SegmentedControl.Item>
</SegmentedControl>
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<SegmentedControl size="sm" defaultValue="a">
  <SegmentedControl.Indicator />
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="a">A</SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="b">B</SegmentedControl.Item>
</SegmentedControl>

<SegmentedControl size="lg" defaultValue="a">
  <SegmentedControl.Indicator />
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="a">A</SegmentedControl.Item>
  <SegmentedControl.Item value="b">B</SegmentedControl.Item>
</SegmentedControl>
```

## Features

- Animated sliding indicator for the active segment
- Compact single-selection UI for small sets of options
- Available under both `SegmentedControl` and `SegmentGroup` names
- Supports all standard sizes
- Keyboard accessible with arrow key navigation
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
